# VerdictLens

version: 2
site: http://localhost:3000/
name: VerdictLens
description: Discovery, shortlist, compare, and compatibility guide for AI models and skills with official-source signals and structured public data.
last_updated: 2026-04-08T20:20:00.000Z
languages: en, zh-TW
formats: text/html, application/json

[product_direction]
- verdictlens is not a generic marketplace clone
- primary flow is discovery -> shortlist -> compare -> routing/compatibility
- skills are modeled as a normalized registry/index layer
- public JSON is shaped for future APIs, team features, registration, saved lists, and routing logic

[entity_types]
- provider | official_url, docs_url, logo, source_refs, last_verified_at
- model | provider, official_url, docs_url, pricing_url, best_for, works_with, source_refs, last_verified_at, scores, pricing, modalities
- skill | category, skill_type, preferred_source_url, install_method, deployment, supported_hosts, supported_providers, capabilities, permission_profile, works_with, source_refs, last_verified_at
- use_case | title, summary, evaluation_lens, recommended_models, recommended_skills, source_refs, last_verified_at

[important_paths]
- landing | http://localhost:3000/
- models_index_en | http://localhost:3000/en/models
- skills_index_en | http://localhost:3000/en/skills
- compare_en | http://localhost:3000/en/compare
- models_json | http://localhost:3000/data/models.json
- skills_json | http://localhost:3000/data/skills.json
- providers_json | http://localhost:3000/data/providers.json
- catalog_json | http://localhost:3000/data/catalog.json

[entities.models]
- gpt-5-4-pro | GPT-5.4 Pro | provider=openai | best_for=coding,research,agent-automation | works_with=Codex CLI,LangGraph,MCP servers,Playwright | official=https://openai.com/api/
- gpt-5-mini | GPT-5 Mini | provider=openai | best_for=agent-automation,research | works_with=n8n,Zapier AI Actions,1Password CLI,MCP servers | official=https://openai.com/api/
- claude-3-7-sonnet | Claude 3.7 Sonnet | provider=anthropic | best_for=coding,research | works_with=Claude Code,LangGraph,Playwright,MCP servers | official=https://www.anthropic.com/claude
- claude-3-5-haiku | Claude 3.5 Haiku | provider=anthropic | best_for=research,agent-automation | works_with=LangGraph,SerpApi,Slack assistants | official=https://www.anthropic.com/claude
- gemini-2-5-pro | Gemini 2.5 Pro | provider=google | best_for=research,agent-automation | works_with=Notebook workflows,Document analysis,n8n,Vertex AI stacks | official=https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api
- gemini-2-5-flash | Gemini 2.5 Flash | provider=google | best_for=agent-automation,research | works_with=Routing layers,Multimodal inboxes,n8n,Vertex AI stacks | official=https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api
- grok-3-beta | Grok 3 Beta | provider=xai | best_for=research | works_with=Fresh web scans,Market monitoring,social-context workflows | official=https://x.ai/
- deepseek-r1 | DeepSeek R1 | provider=deepseek | best_for=coding,research | works_with=Cost-sensitive reasoning stacks,batch analysis,fallback reasoning lanes | official=https://www.deepseek.com/
- llama-4-maverick | Llama 4 Maverick | provider=meta | best_for=agent-automation,research | works_with=self-hosted inference,vector retrieval,custom fine-tuning | official=https://ai.meta.com/llama/
- qwen-3-max | Qwen 3 Max | provider=alibaba-cloud | best_for=research,agent-automation | works_with=multilingual support workflows,enterprise copilots,Asian-market products | official=https://www.alibabacloud.com/product/model-studio
- mistral-large-2 | Mistral Large 2 | provider=mistral | best_for=research,coding | works_with=EU deployment needs,internal copilots,API-first stacks | official=https://mistral.ai/products/la-plateforme
- command-a | Command A | provider=cohere | best_for=research,agent-automation | works_with=RAG stacks,enterprise search,business writing workflows | official=https://cohere.com/
- perplexity-sonar-reasoning-pro | Sonar Reasoning Pro | provider=perplexity | best_for=research | works_with=citation-heavy briefs,market scans,answer-grounding workflows | official=https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/blog/sonar

[entities.skills]
- codex-cli | Codex CLI | type=coding | install=npm | deployment=local | providers=openai | preferred_source=https://github.com/openai/codex
- claude-code | Claude Code | type=coding | install=npm | deployment=local | providers=anthropic | preferred_source=https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/agents-and-tools/claude-code/overview
- langgraph | LangGraph | type=workflow | install=pip | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,meta | preferred_source=https://langchain-ai.github.io/langgraph/
- n8n | n8n | type=workflow | install=hosted | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,cohere | preferred_source=https://docs.n8n.io/
- playwright | Playwright | type=browser | install=npm | deployment=local | providers=any | preferred_source=https://playwright.dev/docs/intro
- openai-whisper | OpenAI Whisper | type=extraction | install=pip | deployment=local | providers=openai,local | preferred_source=https://github.com/openai/whisper
- 1password-cli | 1Password CLI | type=security | install=manual | deployment=hybrid | providers=any | preferred_source=https://developer.1password.com/docs/cli/
- weaviate | Weaviate | type=connector | install=hosted | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,google,meta,any | preferred_source=https://docs.weaviate.io/
- serpapi | SerpApi | type=search | install=hosted | deployment=hosted | providers=any | preferred_source=https://serpapi.com/search-api
- mcp-toolbox | MCP Toolbox | type=mcp | install=manual | deployment=hybrid | providers=openai,anthropic,any | preferred_source=https://modelcontextprotocol.io/introduction
- obsidian-memory-vault | Obsidian Memory Vault | type=memory | install=manual | deployment=local | providers=any | preferred_source=https://help.obsidian.md/
- zapier-ai-actions | Zapier AI Actions | type=workflow | install=hosted | deployment=hosted | providers=openai,anthropic,google,any | preferred_source=https://zapier.com/ai
- e2b-sandbox | E2B Sandbox | type=connector | install=hosted | deployment=hosted | providers=any | preferred_source=https://e2b.dev/docs

[crawl_hints]
- Prefer localized HTML pages for human-readable summaries and editorial context.
- Prefer JSON endpoints for structured ingestion, shortlist generation, and compatibility analysis.
- Scores are editorial guidance, not vendor benchmark claims.
